Abomination
Golgoran, the abomination, represents humanity's basest instincts, fear of death and shadows, the desire to have what you have not. The abomination embodies all that turns man wicked.
Affinity Required:
8
18
Affinity Bonus:
Abomination is a tier three
Constellation
, located in the bottom left part of the devotion window.

Aeon's Hourglass
Aeon is known as the keeper of time, the master of fate's thread. It is by his judgement that mortals are born and die. His symbol is the hourglass.
Affinity Required:
8
18
Affinity Bonus:
Aeon's Hourglass is a tier three
Constellation
, located in the top left part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

Time Dilation (20% Chance on Attack)
The sands of the hourglass spin in an untamed whirlwind. The laws of time itself no longer apply to you.

======================================================================
PAGE: Affliction
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Affliction
======================================================================

Affliction
The appearance of the affliction in the sky, following the great feast of the Autumn Boar, marks the beginning of the cold months, when disease and decay turn Cairn into a bleak contrast to the prosperous months of harvest.
Affinity Required:
4
3
4
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Affliction is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom left part of the devotion window.

Akeron's Scorpion
Akeron was doomed to walk the desert until dead, but fate intervened in the form of a scorpion which led the sun-dazed mortal to water. Akeron survived his sentence and returned to take revenge upon those who had left him to die with the use of scorpion venom.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Akeron's Scorpion is a tier one Eldritch
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.
Stats

v1.0.0.6

PAGE: Amatok the Spirit of Winter

Amatok the Spirit of Winter
In the winter months this constellation appears on the northern horizon. It is said that travelers in desperation who follow the guiding star of Amatok may come upon his lodge. Those who enter will be allowed to sit at his blazing hearth and share in a bountiful feast but those who are foolish, Amatok will flay and prepare as his feast on the following night.
Affinity Required:
4
6
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Amatok the Spirit of Winter is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the top of the devotion window.

Anvil
The hammer strikes down upon the anvil with divine force, forging arms for the gods at Targo's firm grip.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Anvil is a tier one Ascendant
Constellation
, located at the right side of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.1.9.0

Assassin
The assassin, the celestial executioner is rarely seen in the night sky. Its arrival is often cloaked in thick clouds, from which it emerges for brief moments before disappearing once more into the veil.
Affinity Required:
6
4
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Assassin is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the right side of the devotion window.

PAGE: Attak Seru, the Mirage
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Attak_Seru,_the_Mirage
======================================================================

Attak Seru, the Mirage
Attak Seru was the matron of spellweaving, the protector of those daring enough to wield magic. All Arkovian rituals had the symbol of Attak Seru inscribed within the runic circle for precaution; but not even her wards were enough to stave off the effects of the necromancer's curse.
Affinity Required:
16
14
Affinity Bonus:
Attak Seru, the Mirage is a tier three
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.3.0

Skill Progression
Arcane Currents (15% Chance on Attack)
Carve an eldritch symbol into the ground that rapidly emits currents of arcane energy at nearby foes. Arcane Currents scale with player damage bonuses.

Autumn Boar
The autumn boar's arrival in the sky marks the beginning of a celebration of the fall season and the changing of the leaves. The event begins with a great hunt and ends with a feast that lasts until the meat and beer run dry.
Affinity Required:
4
3
4
Affinity Bonus:
3
Autumn Boar is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom right part of the devotion window.

Bard's Harp
Gallia the Bard's music was deemed so enthralling that the gods lifted her up into the skies so that she could entertain them for all eternity.
Affinity Required:
6
6
3

2
2

Constellation
, located on the right side of the devotion window.

Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.

Bat
The vampiric bat easily finds its way across the night sky, hunting for flickers of lost stars to sap of their light.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Bat is a tier one Eldritch
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.1.9.1

Behemoth
The behemoth serves the gods, endlessly moving and shifting the countless stars in the sky at their command.
Affinity Required:
3
4
4
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Behemoth is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom left part of the devotion window.

Berserker
The berserker is the wild and untamed matron of war. She represents strength and ferocity.
Affinity Required:
5
5
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Berserker is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom left part of the devotion window.
Requires an Axe.

v1.0.0.9

Blades of Nadaan
Nadaan is the guardian of thieves and assassins. The appearance of his blades in the sky is often interpreted as a sign of ill omen; that an evil, but necessary, act is about to be carried out.
Affinity Required:
10
Affinity Bonus:
3
2
Blades of Nadaan is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the right side of the devotion window.
Requires a Sword.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9
1
2%

2%

2
+40%
Pierce Damage
3
+8
Defensive Ability
+50%
Pierce Damage
4
+8

+4%
Attack Speed

6

Blind Sage
Many would travel thousands of miles to seek out the wisdom of the great blind sage, but most would leave unsatisfied, their souls undeserving of her ageless wisdom.
Affinity Required:
10
18
Affinity Bonus:
Blind Sage is a tier three
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.

Elemental Seeker (100% Chance on Attack)
Skill Progression
Elemental Seeker (100% Chance on Attack)
Conjure an eldritch creature of pure energy that seeks out and burns nearby foes with its very presence before returning to the Aether in an explosion of energy.
Elemental Seekers Scale with Player Damage Bonuses.

Bysmiel's Bonds
It is said that Bysmiel, the witch god, was headed to the gallows when she abandoned her mortal form and ascended into the heavens, her broken chains the only sign of her escape.
Affinity Required:
4
6
Affinity Bonus:
3
Bysmiel's Bonds is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom left part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.1.0

to All Damage

+30%
to All Damage
Bonus to All Pets
+40%
to All Damage
+8%
Health
5
Bysmiel's Command (20% Chance on Attack)
Devotion Skill Progression
Bysmiel's Command (20% Chance on Attack)
Call forth an eldritch hound to snap and tear at your foes. The hound's presence in the physical realm is unstable and it will only remain at your side for a limited time.
The Eldritch Hound has two special attacks in addition to the default Tooth and Claw attack:
Plague Swipe
- a melee attack which has a 3 target maximum and a 170 degree radius. Deals Physical and Acid Damage.
Plague Breath
- an AoE wave with a 3-5 meter width and an 8m distance. Deals Acid and Poison Damage.
The Hound's Health and Energy scale with player level.

Chariot of the Dead
The chariot of the dead gathers wayward souls and delivers them to their final judgement across the veil.
Affinity Required:
5
5
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Chariot of the Dead is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the top left part of the devotion window.

Constellations

======================================================================
PAGE: Constellation
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Constellation
======================================================================

There are a total of 105
constellations
, each made up of between 3 and 8 stars.
On gaining their first
Devotion
point, the player can choose one of the stars of the
Crossroads
constellation to spend it in. This grants an Affinity point that unlocks other constellations. These in turn grant the Affinity required to unlock constellations of a higher level.
Constellations are ranked in 3 main tiers, from center to the edge of the Devotion window:
Tier 1 constellations require a single Affinity point and give a large Affinity bonus.
Tier 2 constellations require between 8 and 15 Affinity points and give a smaller Affinity bonus.
Tier 3 constellations require 22 or more Affinity points and give no Affinity bonus.
Note that constellations are self-supporting, and their own Affinity bonus counts toward their Affinity requirement. Points can thus be re-allocated from other constellations used to reach them when their bonus is no longer required.
List of Constellations
See:
Constellations by Bonus

Crab
The crab marks the beginning of the most prosperous fishing season of the year, but also one of the most dangerous as the larger spawns of the sea come closer to shore following the migration patterns of the smaller fish and crabs.
Affinity Required:
6
4
Affinity Bonus:
3
Crab (constellation) is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom right part of the devotion window.

PAGE: Crane
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Crane
======================================================================

Crane
The crane represents harmony and peace, its counterpart is the vulture.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Crane is a tier one Order
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6
#

+8
Physique

Spirit

to All Damage

8%

5
10%

Crossroads
The crossroads mark the changing of ways, the opening of endless possibilities.
Affinity Required:
Affinity Bonus:
Crossroads is a tier one
Constellation
. It is the first constellation available to a character, and spending a point in any of its stars will grant an affinity point which will in turn unlock other constellations.

v1.0.0.6

Dire Bear
The dire bear is a symbol of pride and physical might. Those born under its light are said to descend from the kings of old.
Affinity Required:
5
5
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Dire Bear is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the top of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.2.0.3 hotfix 3

Maul (20% Chance on Attack)
Maul nearby foes with the might of a dire bear, feasting on their exposed insides.

Dryad
The dryad embodies nature's spirit and purity, her counterpart is the ghoul.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
Dryad is a tier one Order
Constellation
, located in the top right part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

PAGE: Dying God
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Dying_God
======================================================================

Dying God
In an age preceding the creation of the mortal planes, an elder god was betrayed by his children; his body torn apart and drained of blood so that they could use its power to breathe life into their own creations. His remains were cast out of creation into a void but, incapable of death, the god lingered on in the darkness, doomed to an eternity of pain and madness; feeling the suffering and death of all mortal things that were given life from his blood. His name forgotten by time, the dying god is known only as Ch'thon; he who dwells below creation.
Affinity Required:
8
15
Affinity Bonus:
Dying God is a tier three
Constellation
, located in the top left part of the devotion window.

Eel
The eel glides gently across the night sky, its slick form impossible to grasp.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Eel is a tier one Primordial
Constellation
, located in the top right part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9
1
+12
Defensive Ability
+2%
Chance to Avoid Melee Attacks
2
+15
Defensive Ability
+2%
Chance to Avoid Projectiles
3
+20
Defensive Ability
+4%
Movement Speed
10%
Pierce Resistance

Empty Throne
When Rhowan of Arkovia abdicated his throne, the seat of power remained vacant until the fall of the once great nation as its oligarchs bickered amongst themselves for power.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Empty Throne is a tier one Ascendant
Constellation
, located in the bottom right part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6
#

======================================================================
PAGE: Eye of the Guardian
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Eye_of_the_Guardian

Eye of the Guardian
Dreeg, the witch god, is said to have peered beyond the veil and witnessed the truth of all things. For that, the gods have cursed his mortal form into a spined abomination with a thousand lidless eyes. He now stands immortal guard over the veil, his peerless gaze ever watchful for those who would dare follow in his stead.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
3
Eye of the Guardian is a tier one Eldritch
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9

Falcon
The falcon's sharp gaze scans the skies for easy prey.

1
Affinity Bonus:

Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.

Fiend
The fiend hides in the darkness of the void, hungry for wayward stars to extinguish.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Fiend is a tier one Chaos
Constellation
, located at the left side of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

======================================================================
PAGE: Fox
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Fox
======================================================================

Fox
The wily fox leaps playfully across the night sky.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Fox is a tier one Eldritch
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.1.9.1

Gallows
The gallows is a solemn sign of passed judgement and deadly portents.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Gallows is a tier one Primordial
Constellation
, located in the central part of the devotion window.

Ghoul
The ghoul embodies corruption and decay, its counterpart is the dryad.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
Ghoul (constellation) is a tier one Chaos
Constellation
, located at the left side of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.1.9.1

Ghoulish Hunger (100% Chance at 45% Health)

======================================================================
PAGE: Hammer
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Hammer
======================================================================

Hammer
The hammer strikes down upon the anvil with divine force, forging arms for the gods at Targo's firm grip.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
4
Hammer is a tier one Ascendant
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

======================================================================
PAGE: Harpy (constellation)
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Harpy_(constellation)
======================================================================

Harpy
The harpy represents dark omens. To be born under her light is seen as a sign of shame, driving some families to abandon such children altogether.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Harpy (constellation) is a tier one Ascendant
Constellation
, located at the right side of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.1.0

Harvestman's Scythe
The scythe represents bounty and the time of harvests. It shines brightest in the hottest months, before giving way to the Autumn Boar.
Affinity Required:
3
3
5
Affinity Bonus:
3
3
Harvestman's Scythe is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.

v1.1.9.1

Hawk
The hawk soars through the heavens, seeking its next meal.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
Hawk is a tier one Eldritch
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.

v1.0.0.6

Hound
The loyal hound awaits the call of its celestial masters, ever eager to follow the huntress onto another hunt.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
4
Hound is a tier one Primordial
Constellation
, located in the top right part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

+10
Physique

to All Retaliation Damage

to All Retaliation Damage

Huntress
The huntress roams the night sky, stalking her celestial prey. It is said that her eternal hunt will end when at last she slays the immortal hydra.
Affinity Required:
4
3
4
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Huntress is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.

Hydra
The mythical beast roams the night sky, immortal and imposing. Its many heads are said to regrow within moments.
Affinity Required:
3
3
5
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Hydra is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the left side of the devotion window.
Requires a Ranged Weapon.

Imp
The imp is a trickster, its constellation flickering in and out of view throughout the year.

1
Affinity Bonus:
3
3

Constellation
, located in the central part of the devotion window.

Ishtak, the Spring Maiden
Many in the era of Arkovia would turn to Ishtak in times of need or healing. For all living beings are the children of the Spring Maiden, and all shall find comfort within her gentle embrace.
Affinity Required:
10
15
Affinity Bonus:
Ishtak, the Spring Maiden is a tier three
Constellation
, located at the top right of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.3.0

Jackal
The jackal skulks through the sky, searching for easy pickings.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
Jackal is a tier one Chaos
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.

Kraken
Sea captains are known to refuse voyage if the Kraken is bright in the sky without the light of the Sailor's Guide to protect them.
Affinity Required:
5
5
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Kraken is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the top of the devotion window.
Requires a Two-Handed Weapon.

v1.0.0.6

Leviathan
The great serpent in the sky, devourer of stars and deliverer of the cold chill of night.
Affinity Required:
13
13
Affinity Bonus:
Leviathan (constellation) is a tier three
Constellation
, located in the bottom right part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.1.0

Light of Empyrion
Empyrion, the greatest among the gods, is the light of the world and protector of all of Cairn. It is by his mercy and example that the sun greets mankind each day.
Affinity Required:
8
18
Affinity Bonus:
Light of Empyrion is a tier three
Constellation
, located in the top right part of the devotion window.

Lion
The lion represent bravery, valor, the birth of kings.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
Lion is a tier one Order
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.

======================================================================
PAGE: Lizard
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Lizard
======================================================================

Lizard
The lizard was one of the first spawn of the celestial Tree of Life, the forefather of all reptiles.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
4
Lizard is a tier one Primordial
Constellation
, located in the central part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6
1
+6
Health Regenerated per second
+15%
Constitution
2
+40
Health
+10
Health Regenerated per second
3
+40
Health
Increases Health Regeneration by
15%
+15%
Constitution

Magi
The magi is the patron of all practitioners of magic. Those born under his gaze are said to be blessed, or cursed depending on the point of view, with unparalleled control over arcane forces.
Affinity Required:
10
Affinity Bonus:
3
Magi is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom left part of the devotion window.

Manticore
The manticore is a vicious predator that roams the night sky in search of its next meal. Its bite and tail are filled with venom.
Affinity Required:
4
6
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Manticore is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.

Messenger of War
The messenger of war is a symbol of fear and tyranny. The messenger rides across the starry void, heralding in a new age of conflict and strife.
Affinity Required:
3
7
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Messenger of War is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the top left part of the devotion window.
Stats

v1.0.0.6

======================================================================
PAGE: Mogdrogen the Wolf
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Mogdrogen_the_Wolf
======================================================================

Mogdrogen the Wolf
A titan created during the war of the gods, Mogdrogen has become the god of beasts and is said to roam the wild reaches of Cairn. Legends claim Mogdrogen is a shapeshifter, usually seen as a giant wolf but occasionally taking other forms, even that of a human. Mogdrogen roams the far reaches of Cairn, guarding the wilds against the encroachment of civilization.
Affinity Required:
15
12
Affinity Bonus:
Mogdrogen the Wolf is a tier three
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.

Murmur, Mistress of Rumors
A faithful pet of the gods, the Phoenix of Alladrah blazes a trail across the starry sky.
Affinity Required:
6
6
3
Affinity Bonus:
2
2
Murmur, Mistress of Rumors is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom left of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.

Obelisk of Menhir
Menhir, god of the earth, is a steadfast protector of Cairn. He is prayed to equally both by men eager to defend their home and farmers hoping for a bountiful crop. Ancient stone monoliths mark sacred grounds of Menhir to this day.
Affinity Required:
8
15
Affinity Bonus:
Obelisk of Menhir is a tier three
Constellation
, located in the top right part of the devotion window.

PAGE: Oklaine's Lantern

Oklaine's Lantern
Oklaine, is the guardian of mages and sorcerers. It is said that his guiding light serves as a beacon when traversing the veil between reality and the aether.
Affinity Required:
10
Affinity Bonus:
3
2
Oklaine's Lantern is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom left part of the devotion window.
Requires a scepter, dagger or caster off-hand.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9
1

15%

+25
Offensive Ability
+20
Defensive Ability

+5%

Offensive Ability
4
+50%
to All Damage

5

Oleron
Tragic is the tale of Oleron, who would come to be known as the war god. When faced with the destruction of his nation, Oleron made the difficult choice to rise to the defense of his people, but the victory cost him his wife and only child. The loss weighed heavily upon the war hero, and legends say that he would charge recklessly into battle since that day, seeking death upon a foe's blade so that he could be reunited with his family. But the bittersweet release had never come. To this day, when soldiers charge into battle, they call upon Oleron's name to grant them strength and courage.
Affinity Required:
20
7
Affinity Bonus:
Oleron is a tier three
Constellation
, located in the bottom right part of the devotion window.

Owl
The owl represents wisdom and scholarly pursuits. Spellwork is believed to be more potent under the gaze of the owl.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Owl is a tier one Ascendant
Constellation
, located at the right side of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9
#

1
+10
Spirit
2
8%

-5%

3
+24%

Panther
The panther represents spiritual strength and dexterity.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Panther is a tier one Order
Constellation
, located in the top right part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9

Quill
The quill is said to have been used by the gods to bestow their decrees upon mankind. Its ink is the endless night sky.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
3
Quill is a tier one Eldritch
Constellation
, located near the center bottom of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.
Stats
#

Rat
The plague rat skitters across the night sky, careful to avoid the gaze of the falcon and hawk.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Rat is a tier one Chaos
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6
#
Stats
1
+8
Cunning
+8
Spirit
2
60
Poison Damage over
5
seconds
+24%
Poison Damage

+15
Cunning
+15
Spirit
10%
Poison & Acid Resistance
4
120
Poison Damage over
5
seconds
+20%
Poison Damage with +
30%
increased duration

======================================================================
PAGE: Rattosh, the Veilwarden
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Rattosh,_the_Veilwarden
======================================================================

Rattosh, the Veilwarden
Concealed in shadows, the great guardian of Arkovia watched over the veil between realities, ensuring that no evil would ever escape the spirit realm and wreak havoc upon the living. When the Arkovian Curse spread across the land, it was Rattosh that the people begged for a merciful end, but none ever came.
Affinity Required:
10
6
6
Affinity Bonus:
Rattosh, the Veilwarden is a tier three
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.4.0

Skill Progression
Will of Rattosh (15% Chance on Attack)
Mark the souls of your foes with the symbol of Rattosh. Their lives and fates sealed, left at the mercy of Rattosh's servant, Typhos.

Raven
The raven represents guile. It is for this reason that the witch gods have taken favor in ravens as their familiars and messengers.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Raven is a tier one Eldritch
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

Revenant
The revenant represents death and misery. It is said that none can escape its deathly gaze, not even the gods themselves.
Affinity Required:
8
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Revenant is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the top left part of the devotion window.

v1.0.0.9

Raise the Dead (100% Chance on Enemy Death)
Skill Progression
Raise the Dead (100% Chance on Enemy Death)
Raise the dead to serve you. The necrotic energies required for this ritual are very unstable however, and the undead minions will only exist for a limited time.
The Dead scale with Player Bonuses.

Rhowan's Crown
It is said that when Rhowan of Arkovia abdicated his throne, his crown and scepter were quickly lost, only to be found in the night sky the following day.
Affinity Required:
4
6
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Rhowan's Crown is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.

Rhowan's Scepter
It is said that when Rhowan of Arkovia abdicated his throne, his crown and scepter mysteriously disappeared, only to be found in the night sky the following day.
Affinity Required:
6
4
Affinity Bonus:
3
2
Rhowan's Scepter is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom right part of the devotion window.
Requires a Mace.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9

5

1

Sailor's Guide
The sailor's guide serves as a celestial marker for those lost at sea. Its guiding light has saved many a sailor braving the tumultuous waters.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Sailor's Guide is a tier one Primordial
Constellation
, located in the central part of the devotion window.
Stats

v1.2.0.3 hotfix 3

Scales of Ulcama
Ulcama, the judge, presides over the heavens and judges the lives of all mortals. It is said that all of a person's deeds are placed upon his golden scales, and should the evils of their life outweigh the good, their spirit is forever banished into the void.
Affinity Required:
8
Affinity Bonus:
2
Scales of Ulcama is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the right side of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

to All Damage

Skill Progression
Tip the Scales (20% Chance when Hit)
Tip the scales in your favor, sapping your attackers of vitality and transferring it to you.

Scholar's Light
The scholar's light glows brightly when sleep-deprived scholars are still working under the dim glow of their candles.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
4
Scholar's Light is a tier one Eldritch
Constellation
, located at the bottom of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9
#

+8

+10

+24%

Shepherd's Crook
The shepherd guides his celestial flock across the night sky.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
Shepherd's Crook is a tier one Ascendant
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.

v1.0.0.6

Shieldmaiden
The shieldmaiden stands guard over the stars, so that none leave their celestial positions without the behest of the gods.
Affinity Required:
4
6
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Shieldmaiden is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the top right part of the devotion window.
Requires a Shield.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

Solael's Witchblade
Solael is said to be the most cruel of the three witch gods, having carved open countless victims with his curved sacrificial blade in his mad pursuit of immortality.
Affinity Required:
4
6
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Solael's Witchblade is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the left side of the devotion window.

v1.0.0.9

Solemn Watcher
Symon, the watcher, stood guard at Symon's Ward til his dying day, protecting the empire from supernatural threats. Symon's eternal vigil continues in the celestial sky, watching over Cairn as he did in life.
Affinity Required:
10
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Solemn Watcher is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the top right part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

Spear of the Heavens
The Spear of the Heavens is the celestial symbol of power. It is said that the Spear was wielded by Empyrion himself when he smote down the Dying God and shattered the deity into a thousand-thousand pieces.
Affinity Required:
7
20
Affinity Bonus:
Spear of the Heavens is a tier three
Constellation
, located in the top left part of the devotion window.
Stats

v1.0.0.9

Spider
The spider weaves its web in the night sky, trapping rogue stars for the gods to weave into their celestial tapestry.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
6
Spider (constellation) is a tier one Eldritch
Constellation
, located at the left side of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9

Staff of Rattosh
The winged staff of Rattosh is said to be the key to the veil separating the physical and spirit realms. When it is visible in the sky, it is believed that the barrier between the living and the dead is at its thinnest.
Affinity Required:
6
3
3
Affinity Bonus:
2
2
Staff of Rattosh is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the top of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.

Stag
The stag is the gentle yet stalwart guardian of nature's domain.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Stag is a tier one Order
Constellation
, located in the top left of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.

Targo the Builder
Targo is the patron of craftsmen and architects, the god believed to have created the celestial tapestry upon which all stars now rest.
Affinity Required:
4
6
Affinity Bonus:
1
Targo the Builder is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the right side of the devotion window.

v1.0.0.9

Tempest
The tempest is said to shine brightest when a dangerous storm looms on the horizon. Children born during a thunderstorm are believed marked for great things.
Affinity Required:
5
5
Affinity Bonus:
1
1
Tempest is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the top of the devotion window.

Toad
The Toad represents disorder, a favored symbol of witches and warlocks.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
3
Toad is a tier one Ascendant
Constellation
, located in the bottom right of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.

Tortoise
The tortoise represents fortitude and unyielding dedication.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Tortoise is a tier one Order
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9
#

Skill Progression
Turtle Shell (100% Chance on 40% Health)
When threatened, a protective barrier forms around you, negating further harm.

Tree of Life
Legends say that when the world was first born from the darkness of the void, a single tree was planted which would come to bear all the fruit and animals of the world.
Affinity Required:
7
20
Affinity Bonus:

Constellation
, located at the top of the devotion window.

Tsunami
The tsunami marks the most dangerous time of the year to take to the great seas, with frequent storms and devastating waves ruining many an expedition. Wise captains plan their journeys to avoid the storm season.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Tsunami is a tier one Primordial
Constellation
, located in the central part of the devotion window.
Stats

v1.1.9.1

======================================================================
PAGE: Typhos, the Jailor of Souls
CATEGORIES: Constellations

======================================================================

Typhos, the Jailor of Souls
Typhos is the loyal servant of Rattosh, a vigilant hunter of rogue souls that refuse passage by the chariot of the dead.
Affinity Required:
6
3
3
Affinity Bonus:
2
2
Typhos, the Jailor of Souls is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the bottom right of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.

Ulo the Keeper of the Waters
Ulo represents the endless cycle and unstoppable flow of water, renewing all the rivers of the world and in turn the lakes and the seas.
Affinity Required:
4
6
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Ulo the Keeper of the Waters is a tier two
Constellation
, located in the top right part of the devotion window.

Cleansing Waters (100% Chance on Attack
Ulo's cleansing waters purge all foul magic from the area, removing beneficial auras and spells from foes while allies are cleansed of negative ailments, including damage over time effects.

PAGE: Ultos, Shepherd of Storms

Ultos, Shepherd of Storms
Ultos was the lesser of his celestial brethren in Arkovian lore, but nevertheless remained a powerful symbol, for it was his rains that allowed the harvest to grow and his lightning that caused unspeakable destruction. Somewhat ironically given his status, Ultos is the only Arkovian god whose worship endured beyond the fall of the empire.
Affinity Required:
6
10
10
Affinity Bonus:
Ultos, Shepherd of Storms is a tier three
Constellation
, located at the bottom left of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.3.0

Hand of Ultos (100% Chance on Critical Attack)

Ulzuin's Torch
Ulzuin the Betrayed was once a god of healing and ceremonies, but millennia of torment following a most grisly betrayal from his lover has twisted the once benevolent entity into a bitter deity interested only in vengeance and destruction.
Affinity Required:
8
15
Affinity Bonus:
Ulzuin's Torch is a tier three
Constellation
, located at the left side of the devotion window.

Unknown Soldier
Many a legend are told about the nameless men and women who were felled in battle, their valor and deeds never acknowledged. In honor of their sacrifice, the stars themselves were rearranged to form the Unknown Soldier.
Affinity Required:
15
8
Affinity Bonus:
Unknown Soldier is a tier three
Constellation
, located at the right side of the devotion window.
The Living Shadow summons convert a percentage of damage dealt to Health, which is transferred to the player.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.1.0

Living Shadow (100% Chance on Critical Attack)
Skill Progression
Living Shadow (100% Chance on Critical Hit)
A manifestation of a nameless hero rises to fight alongside you and restore your vitality with every blow.
Living Shadows scale with player damage bonuses.

======================================================================

Viper
The viper represents the flow of energy between the living world and the aether, which powers all forms of magic.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Viper is a tier one Chaos
Constellation
, located in the center of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.1.9.1
#
Stats
1
+15
Cunning
+15
Spirit
2
15%
Chance of
36
Energy Leech over
2
Seconds
+10%
Energy absorbed from Enemy Spells
3
+10%
Vitality Resistance
4
20%
Reduced target's Elemental Resistances for
3
Seconds
+3%
Offensive Ability
Note that the
20% Reduced target's Elemental Resistances for 3 Seconds
is tied to Weapon Damage, and is best used with weapon attacks, or spells with a high % Weapon Damage component.
A spell without % Weapon Damage will not apply the Resist debuff to enemies at all, and where it does have % Weapon Damage, the value will act as a multiplier for the Reduced Resistances; for example Callidor's Tempest, with 12% Weapon Damage, will only lower enemy resistances by 12% of 20% ( i.e. 2.4%). However, even if
Shadow Strike (Skill)
is dealing 300% Weapon Damage, it will only reduce enemy resistances by 20%.

Vire, the Stone Matron
Commonly depicted in Arkovian lore as the matron of the gods, and thus the mightiest, the Stone Matron represented Cairn itself, the fortitude and strength of stone, unmoving against even the greatest odds.
Affinity Required:
18
12
Affinity Bonus:
Vire, the Stone Matron is a tier three
Constellation
, located at the top of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.3.0
#

Skill Progression
Fist of Vire (20% Chance when Hit)
The crushing fist of Vire rises up from the earth to subdue your foes with the strength of the earth.

Vulture
The vulture represents disorder and chaos, its counterpart is the crane.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
5
Vulture (constellation) is a tier one Chaos
Constellation
, located at the left side of the devotion window.
Stats

v1.0.1.0

======================================================================
PAGE: Wendigo (constellation)
CATEGORIES: Constellations
URL: https://grimdawn.fandom.com/wiki/Wendigo_(constellation)
======================================================================

Wendigo
The wendigo is a primal hunger spirit. Many shamans go against their very teachings and try to make a pact with wendigos in the hope of invoking the vile spirits upon their enemies; but wendigos are ultimately very perilous to control and have driven many  shamans mad, filling them with an insatiable hunger that inevitably leads to cannibalism.
Affinity Required:
4
6
Affinity Bonus:
2
Wendigo (constellation) is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the left side of the devotion window.
Stats

v1.0.1.0

6
Wendigo's Mark (15% Chance on Attack)
Skill Progression
You mark your foes with the sign of the wendigo, sapping them of what little there is left of their vitality and transferring it to you.

Widow
The widow mourns for the lost and the dead. When streaks of light mark the night sky, they are said to be the widow's tears.
Affinity Required:
6
4
Affinity Bonus:
3
Widow is a tier two
Constellation
, located at the top of the devotion window.

Arcane Bomb (25% Chance on Attack)
Mark the ground with an arcane sigil that erupts upon coming in contact with an enemy.
Arcane Bombs take 1 second to arm.

Wolverine
The wolverine represents untamed ferocity.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
6
Wolverine is a tier one Ascendant
Constellation
, located in the bottom right part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.9

Wraith
The wraith roams the skies for all eternity, its final judgement by Ulcama never passed.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
3
3
Wraith (constellation) is a tier one Primordial
Constellation
, located in the top part of the devotion window.
Stats
Updated to:
v1.0.0.6

Wretch
The wretch writhes in the night sky, the taint of the Dying God having taken hold within its flesh.
Affinity Required:
1
Affinity Bonus:
2
3
Wretch is a tier one Chaos
Constellation
, located in the center left of the devotion window.
Available only with the
Ashes of Malmouth
Expansion.
